script: const getAudioPath=async(t,e,i,a)=>{const s=require("path"),n=require("fs");let o=(new Date).getTime()+".mp3";return n.existsSync(s.join(i,"tts"))?(n.writeFileSync(s.join(i,"tts",o),await getTTSAudio(t,e,a)),console.log("folder already exists")):(n.mkdirSync(s.join(i,"tts")),n.writeFileSync(s.join(i,"tts",o),await getTTSAudio(t,e,a)),console.log("folder created successfully")),s.join(i,"tts",o)},getTTSAudio=async(t,e,i)=>{let a=i.apiKey||"",s=i.model||"speech-02-hd",n=i.voiceName||"English_expressive_narrator",o=e?Math.min(2,Math.max(.5,e)):1;const r=require("axios");return new Promise((e,i)=>{r.post("https://api.minimax.io/v1/t2a_v2",{model:s,text:t,stream:!1,voice_setting:{voice_id:n,speed:o,vol:1,pitch:0},audio_setting:{sample_rate:32e3,bitrate:128e3,format:"mp3",channel:1},output_format:"hex"},{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${a}`,"Content-Type":"application/json"}}).then(t=>{console.log(t);let a=t.data&&t.data.data&&t.data.data.audio;a?e(Buffer.from(a,"hex")):i("")}).catch(t=>{console.log(t),i("")})})},getLocaleFromVoiceId=t=>t.startsWith("English_")||t.startsWith("English ")?"en-US":t.startsWith("Chinese (Mandarin)")||t.startsWith("Mandarin_")?"zh-CN":t.startsWith("Cantonese")?"zh-HK":t.startsWith("Japanese_")?"ja-JP":t.startsWith("Korean_")?"ko-KR":t.startsWith("Spanish_")?"es-ES":t.startsWith("Portuguese_")?"pt-BR":t.startsWith("French_")?"fr-FR":t.startsWith("German_")?"de-DE":t.startsWith("Russian_")?"ru-RU":t.startsWith("Italian_")?"it-IT":t.startsWith("Dutch_")?"nl-NL":t.startsWith("Arabic_")?"ar":t.startsWith("Turkish_")?"tr-TR":t.startsWith("Ukrainian_")?"uk-UA":t.startsWith("Thai_")?"th-TH":t.startsWith("Polish_")?"pl-PL":t.startsWith("Romanian_")?"ro-RO":t.startsWith("Greek_")||t.startsWith("greek_")?"el-GR":t.startsWith("Czech_")||t.startsWith("czech_")?"cs-CZ":t.startsWith("Finnish_")||t.startsWith("finnish_")?"fi-FI":t.startsWith("Hindi_")||t.startsWith("hindi_")?"hi-IN":t.startsWith("Indonesian_")?"id-ID":t.startsWith("Vietnamese_")?"vi-VN":"en-US",getGenderFromVoiceId=(t,e)=>{const i=(t+" "+(e||"")).toLowerCase();return["female","woman","girl","lady","queen","princess","heroine","sister","aunt","wife","girlfriend","hostess","narrator_f"].some(t=>i.includes(t))?"female":["male","man","boy","gentleman","king","prince","knight","butler","uncle","husband","narrator_m"].some(t=>i.includes(t))?"male":"unknown"},getTTSVoice=async t=>{let e=t.apiKey||"";const i=require("axios");return new Promise((a,s)=>{i.post("https://api.minimax.io/v1/get_voice",{voice_type:"all"},{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${e}`,"Content-Type":"application/json"}}).then(e=>{console.log(e);let i=[...e.data&&e.data.system_voice||[],...e.data&&e.data.voice_cloning||[],...e.data&&e.data.voice_generation||[]];a(i.map(e=>({name:e.voice_id,gender:getGenderFromVoiceId(e.voice_id,e.voice_name),locale:getLocaleFromVoiceId(e.voice_id),displayName:`MiniMax TTS - ${e.voice_name||e.voice_id}`,plugin:"minimax-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...t,voiceName:e.voice_id}})))}).catch(t=>{console.log(t),s("")})})};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
